节点.功能描述: The userAuth module provides APIs for user authentication, which applies to scenarios such as device unlocking, payment, and application login.
Maximum reuse duration of the authentication result, in milliseconds. The value is 300000.
Permanent lockout duration, in milliseconds. The value is 0x7fffffff.

Indicates that the device does not support authentication.

Indicates that the authentication task is busy. Wait for a few seconds and try again.
Indicates incorrect parameters.
Indicates that the authenticator is locked.
Indicates that the user has not enrolled the authenticator.
Indicates other errors.

Used to initiate authentication.

节点.功能描述: Asynchronous callback of authentication operation.

The authentication result code is returned through the callback. If the authentication is passed, the authentication token is returned in extraInfo, If the authentication fails, the remaining authentication times are returned in extraInfo, If the authentication executor is locked, the freezing time is returned in extraInfo.

节点.属性类型: (module: number, acquire: number, extraInfo: any) => void
节点.功能描述: During an authentication, the TipsCode is returned through the callback.
Authentication result: authentication token, remaining authentication times, freezing time.
The authentication result if the authentication is passed.
The remaining authentication times if the authentication fails.
The freezing time if the authentication executor is locked.
Enum for operation result.
Indicates that the result is success or ability is supported.
Indicates that authentication failed.
Indicates other errors.
Indicates that this operation has been canceled.
Indicates that this operation has timed out.
Indicates that this authentication type is not supported.
Indicates that the authentication trust level is not supported.
Indicates that the authentication task is busy. Wait for a few seconds and try again.
Indicates incorrect parameters.
Indicates that the authenticator is locked.
Indicates that the user has not enrolled the authenticator.
The enumeration of prompt codes in the process of face authentication.
Indicates that the obtained facial image is too bright due to high illumination.
Indicates that the obtained facial image is too dark due to low illumination.
Indicates that the face is too close to the device.
Indicates that the face is too far away from the device.
Indicates that the device is too high, and that only the upper part of the face is captured.
Indicates that the device is too low, and that only the lower part of the face is captured.
Indicates that the device is deviated to the right, and that only the right part of the face is captured.
Indicates that the device is deviated to the left, and that only the left part of the face is captured.
Indicates that the face moves too fast during facial information collection.
Indicates that the face is not facing the device.
Indicates that no face is detected.
The enumeration of prompt codes in the process of fingerprint authentication.
Indicates that the image acquired is good.
Indicates that the fingerprint image is too noisy due to suspected or detected dirt on sensor.
Indicates that the fingerprint image is too noisy to process due to a detected condition.
Indicates that only a partial fingerprint image is detected.
Indicates that the fingerprint image is incomplete due to quick motion.
Indicates that the fingerprint image is unreadable due to lack of motion.
Enumerates the identity authentication types.
PIN authentication.
Facial authentication.
Fingerprint authentication.
Enumerates the trust levels of the authentication result. For details about typical scenarios and examples, see Principles for Classifying Biometric Authentication Trust Levels.

Authentication trust level 1. The authentication of this level can identify individual users and provides limited liveness detection capabilities. It is applicable to scenarios such as service risk control and access to common personal data.

Authentication trust level 2. The authentication of this level can accurately identify individual users and provides regular liveness detection capabilities. It is applicable to scenarios such as device unlocking and application login.

Authentication trust level 3. The authentication of this level can accurately identify individual users and provides strong liveness detection capabilities. It is applicable to scenarios such as device unlocking.

Authentication trust level 4. The authentication of this level can accurately identify individual users and provides powerful liveness detection capabilities. It is applicable to scenarios such as small-amount payment.
Authentication events.
Return information of Authentication events.
Asynchronous callback of authentication event.
The authentication event callback.
Authentication result information.
The authentication result.
The authentication token if the authentication is passed.
The remaining authentication attempts if the authentication fails.
The lockout duration if the authentication executor is locked.
Authentication tip info.
The authentication module of sending tip information.
Tip information, used to prompt the business to perform some operations.
Authentication instance, used to initiate a complete authentication.
Turn on authentication event listening.
Turn off authentication event listening.
Start this authentication, an instance can only perform authentication once.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 12500005 - The authentication type is not supported.
@throws { BusinessError } 12500006 - The authentication trust level is not supported.
@throws { BusinessError } 12500007 - The authentication task is busy.
@throws { BusinessError } 12500010 - The type of credential has not been enrolled.

error_codes.description: The authentication type is not supported.
The authentication trust level is not supported.
The type of credential has not been enrolled.

节点.功能描述: Cancel this authentication.

Checks whether the specified authentication capability is supported.

NOTE:
Error code 12500005 is returned if the authentication executor is not registered and the specified authentication capability is not supported.
Error code 12500006 is returned if the authentication executor has been registered, the authentication functionality is not disabled, but the authentication trust level is lower than that specified by the service.
Error code 12500010 is returned if the authentication executor has been registered, the authentication functionality is not disabled, but the user has not enrolled credential.
Error code 12500013 is returned if the authentication executor has been registered, the authentication functionality is not disabled, but the password has expired.
If getAvailableStatus is called to check whether lock screen password authentication at ATL4 is supported for a user who has enrolled a 4-digit PIN as the lock screen password (the authentication trust level is ATL3), error code 12500010 will be returned.


1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
注释信息: @param { UserAuthType } authType - Authentication type. PIN is supported since API version 11.
@throws { BusinessError } 12500005 - The authentication type is not supported.
@throws { BusinessError } 12500006 - The authentication trust level is not supported.
@throws { BusinessError } 12500010 - The type of credential has not been enrolled.
@throws { BusinessError } 12500013 - Operation failed because of PIN expired.

parameters.说明: Authentication type. PIN is supported since API version 11.

error_codes.description: The authentication type is not supported.
The authentication trust level is not supported.
The type of credential has not been enrolled.
Operation failed because of PIN expired.

节点.功能描述: Authentication lock State.
Indicates that the authenticator has been locked or not, true if locked.
The remaining attempts if the authentication has not been locked.
The remaining lockout duration if the authentication has been locked. It would be PERMANENT_LOCKOUT_DURATION if permanently locked and requires PIN authentication to unlock.

Obtains the lock state of specified authentication type. which contains lock state, remaining attempts if the authentication has not been locked, or remaining lockout duration if the authentication has been locked.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<AuthLockState } AuthLockState - Returns the lock state of the specified authType,
@throws { BusinessError } 12500005 - The authentication type is not supported.
@throws { BusinessError } 12500008 - The parameter is out of range.
@throws { BusinessError } 12500010 - The type of credential has not been enrolled.
节点.return_description: AuthLockState - Returns the lock state of the specified authType,

error_codes.description: The authentication type is not supported.
The parameter is out of range.
The type of credential has not been enrolled.

节点.功能描述: Enumerates the modes for reusing authentication results.
The device unlock authentication result can be reused within the validity period if the authentication type matches any of the authentication types specified for this authentication.
The device unlock authentication result can be reused within the validity period regardless of the authentication type.

Any identity authentication result (including device unlock authentication result) can be reused within the validity period if the authentication type matches any of the authentication types specified for this authentication.
Any identity authentication result (including device unlock authentication result) can be reused within the validity period regardless of the authentication type.

Represents information about the authentication result reuse.

NOTE:
If the credential changes within the reuse duration after a successful identity authentication (including device unlock authentication), the authentication result can still be reused and the actual EnrolledState is returned in the authentication result.
If the credential used for the previous authentication has been deleted when the authentication result is used: 1.If the deleted credential is face or fingerprint, the authentication result can still be reused, but credentialCount and credentialDigest in the EnrolledState returned are both 0. 2.If the deleted credential is a lock screen password, the reuse will fail.
Authentication result reuse mode.
Period for which the authentication result can be reused. The value must be greater than 0 and less than MAX_ALLOWABLE_REUSE_DURATION.
Defines the user authentication parameters.
Random challenge value, which can be used to prevent replay attacks. It cannot exceed 32 bytes and can be passed in Uint8Array([]) format.
Authentication type list, which specifies the types of authentication provided on the user authentication page.
Authentication trust level. For details, see Principles for Classifying Biometric Authentication Trust Levels.
Information about the authentication result reuse.
Indicates whether to skip biometric authentication which has been locked by continuous failures.
Represents the information presented on the user authentication page.
Title of the user authentication page. It cannot exceed 500 characters.

Text on the navigation button. It cannot exceed 60 characters. It is supported in single fingerprint or facial authentication before API version 18. Since API version 18, it is also supported in combined facial and fingerprint authentication.

Whether to display the authentication dialog box in modal application mode. This mode is applicable only to 2-in-1 devices. If this mode is not used or other types of devices are used, the authentication dialog box is displayed in modal system mode.
Represents the user authentication result. If the authentication is successful, the authentication type and token information are returned.
User authentication result. If the authentication is successful, SUCCESS is returned. Otherwise, an error code is returned. For details, see UserAuthResultCode.
The authentication result if the authentication is passed.
Credential type for authentication succeed.
The enrolled state for authentication succeed. EnrolledState would be returned when the authentication has passed.
Provides callbacks to return the authentication result.
Called to return the authentication result. If the authentication is successful, UserAuthResult contains the token information.
Authentication tip code.
Authentication tip for authentication failed.
Authentication tip for authentication timeout.
Authentication tip for authentication temporarily frozen.
Authentication tip for authentication permanent frozen.
Authentication tip for widget load success.
Authentication tip for widget released.
Authentication tip for authentication failed which causes authentication frozen.
Authentication tip information.
Authentication tip type.
Authentication tip code.
The authentication tip information is returned through the callback.
注释信息: @param { AuthTipInfo } authTipInfo - Tips returned during authentication process.

节点.功能描述: Provides APIs for user authentication. The user authentication widget is supported. Before using the APIs of UserAuthInstance, you must obtain a UserAuthInstance instance by using getUserAuthInstance.

Subscribes to the user authentication result.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameter types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { 'result' } type - Event type. The value is result, which indicates the authentication result.
@param { IAuthCallback } callback - Callback used to return the user authentication result.

parameters.说明: Event type. The value is result, which indicates the authentication result.
Callback used to return the user authentication result.

节点.功能描述:

节点.功能描述: Enumerates the authentication result codes.
The authentication is successful.
The authentication failed.
A general operation error occurred.
The authentication is canceled.
The authentication has timed out.
The authentication type is not supported.
Indicates that the authentication trust level is not supported.
Indicates that the authentication task is busy. Wait for a few seconds and try again.
Indicates that the paramter is out of range.
Indicates that the authenticator is locked.
Indicates that the user has not enrolled the specified system identity authentication credential.
Indicates that the user cancels the system authentication and selects a custom authentication of the application. The caller needs to launch the custom authentication page.
Indicates that the authentication failed because the lock screen password has expired.
